exam.name: Project Management Professional (PMP) Certification Exam
exam.category_description: Exam-aligned prep for project management certifications with structured coverage of leadership, delivery, governance, and business outcomes.
exam.hero_headline: Pass the PMP with official-outline coverage.
exam.hero_subheadline: Study the PMI exam content in focused 15-minute topics that build confidence across people, process, and business environment domains.
exam.companion_problem: Most PMP prep materials are either too broad, too jargon-heavy, or disconnected from the official exam outline, making it hard to study systematically and retain what matters.
exam.companion_solution: Only Ever turns the official PMI syllabus into a clear sequence of 15-minute study topics, so you can master the tested domains with structured, retention-focused coverage.
exam.learner_profile: Project manager, team lead, consultant, or career switcher preparing to validate cross-functional delivery skills. Works across stakeholders, schedules, risks, and business goals. Benefits from scenario-based explanations, decision frameworks, and clear distinctions between predictive, agile, and hybrid approaches.

sections.title: Domain I: People
sections.description: Focuses on the skills and activities associated with effectively leading a project team and engaging with stakeholders.

topics.title: Develop a Common Vision
topics.description: Establish and promote a shared vision among key stakeholders while addressing misunderstandings.
learning_objectives: Help ensure a shared vision with key stakeholders.
Promote the shared vision.
Keep the vision current.
Break down situations to identify the root cause of a misunderstanding of the vision.

topics.title: Manage Conflicts: Sources and Context
topics.description: Identify the root sources of project conflicts and analyze their underlying context.
learning_objectives: Identify conflict sources.
Analyze the context for the conflict.

topics.title: Manage Conflicts: Resolution and Ground Rules
topics.description: Implement conflict resolution strategies and establish ground rules for the team and stakeholders.
learning_objectives: Implement an agreed-on resolution strategy.
Communicate conflict management principles with the team and external stakeholders.
Establish an environment that fosters adherence to common ground rules.
Manage and rectify ground rule violations.

topics.title: Lead the Project Team: Expectations and Empowerment
topics.description: Establish clear expectations, empower team members, and represent the team's voice effectively.
learning_objectives: Establish expectations at the team level.
Empower the team.
Solve problems.
Represent the voice of the team.

topics.title: Lead the Project Team: Leadership and Roles
topics.description: Determine suitable leadership styles and define clear roles within a diverse team.
learning_objectives: Support the team's varied experiences, skills, and perspectives.
Determine an appropriate leadership style.
Establish clear roles and responsibilities within the team.

topics.title: Engage Stakeholders: Identification and Analysis
topics.description: Identify all project stakeholders and analyze their unique needs and influence.
learning_objectives: Identify stakeholders.
Analyze stakeholders.
Analyze and tailor communication to stakeholder needs.

topics.title: Engage Stakeholders: Execution and Alignment
topics.description: Execute engagement plans and build trust to align stakeholders with project objectives.
learning_objectives: Execute the stakeholder engagement plan.
Optimize alignment among stakeholder needs, expectations, and project objectives.
Build trust and influence stakeholders to accomplish project objectives.

topics.title: Align Stakeholder Expectations
topics.description: Categorize stakeholders and actively manage their expectations through facilitated discussions and mentoring.
learning_objectives: Categorize stakeholders.
Identify stakeholder expectations.
Facilitate discussions to align expectations.
Organize and act on mentoring opportunities.

topics.title: Manage Stakeholder Expectations
topics.description: Identify and monitor both internal and external customer expectations to ensure desired outcomes.
learning_objectives: Identify internal and external customer expectations.
Align and maintain outcomes to internal and external customer expectations.
Monitor internal and external customer satisfaction/expectations and respond as needed.

topics.title: Help Ensure Knowledge Transfer
topics.description: Identify critical project knowledge and foster an environment where information is effectively shared.
learning_objectives: Identify knowledge critical to the project.
Gather knowledge.
Foster an environment for knowledge transfer.

topics.title: Plan and Manage Communication: Strategy
topics.description: Define a robust communication strategy that promotes collaboration and establishes feedback loops.
learning_objectives: Define a communication strategy.
Promote transparency and collaboration.
Establish a feedback loop.

topics.title: Plan and Manage Communication: Reporting
topics.description: Ensure project reporting aligns with sponsor expectations and supports governance processes.
learning_objectives: Understand reporting requirements.
Create reports aligned with sponsors and stakeholder expectations.
Support reporting and governance processes.

sections.title: Domain II: Process
sections.description: Focuses on the technical aspects of successfully managing projects, applying predictive, agile, or hybrid methodologies.

topics.title: Develop Integrated Project Management Plan: Approach
topics.description: Determine the appropriate development approach and project needs for a comprehensive management plan.
learning_objectives: Assess project needs, complexity, and magnitude.
Recommend a project management development approach (i.e., predictive, adaptive/agile, or hybrid management).
Determine critical information requirements (e.g., sustainability).

topics.title: Develop Integrated Project Management Plan: Execution
topics.description: Create and maintain the project plan by estimating resources, tracking efforts, and outlining an execution strategy.
learning_objectives: Recommend a project execution strategy.
Create an integrated project management plan.
Estimate work effort and resource requirements.
Maintain the integrated project management plan.

topics.title: Develop Integrated Project Management Plan: Analysis
topics.description: Assess project gaps, dependencies, and business value through data collection and analysis.
learning_objectives: Assess consolidated project plans for dependencies, gaps, and continued business value.
Collect and analyze data to make informed project decisions.

topics.title: Develop and Manage Project Scope
topics.description: Define, break down, and gain agreement on the scope of project work.
learning_objectives: Define scope.
Obtain stakeholder agreement on project scope.
Break down scope.

topics.title: Help Ensure Value-Based Delivery: Identification
topics.description: Identify and prioritize value components based on stakeholder feedback.
learning_objectives: Identify value components with key stakeholders.
Prioritize work based on value and stakeholder feedback.

topics.title: Help Ensure Value-Based Delivery: Assessment
topics.description: Continuously evaluate business value, delivery options, and mechanisms for tracking benefits.
learning_objectives: Assess opportunities to deliver value incrementally.
Examine the business value throughout the project.
Verify a measurement system is in place to track benefits.
Evaluate delivery options to demonstrate value.

topics.title: Plan and Manage Resources
topics.description: Define requirements, and continuously manage and optimize project resources and availability.
learning_objectives: Define and plan resources based on requirements.
Manage and optimize resource needs and availability.

topics.title: Plan and Manage Procurement: Strategy
topics.description: Select correct contract types and determine a strategy for effective procurement and vendor management.
learning_objectives: Plan procurement.
Select preferred contract types.
Determine a negotiation strategy.
Plan and manage the procurement strategy.

topics.title: Plan and Manage Procurement: Execution
topics.description: Execute procurements, evaluate performance, and participate in direct negotiations with suppliers.
learning_objectives: Execute a procurement management plan.
Evaluate vendor performance.
Verify objectives of the procurement agreement are met.
Participate in agreement negotiations.
Manage suppliers and contracts.
Develop a delivery solution.

topics.title: Plan and Manage Finance: Allocations
topics.description: Analyze financial needs, quantify risk allocations, and manage financial reserves throughout the project.
learning_objectives: Analyze project financial needs.
Quantify risk and contingency financial allocations.
Plan spend tracking throughout the project life cycle.
Manage financial reserves.

topics.title: Plan and Manage Finance: Tracking
topics.description: Plan reporting cycles, anticipate financial challenges, and manage cost variations.
learning_objectives: Plan financial reporting.
Anticipate future finance challenges.
Monitor financial variations and work with the governance process.

topics.title: Plan and Optimize Quality: Requirements
topics.description: Identify quality standards, tools, and regulatory requirements necessary for project deliverables.
learning_objectives: Gather quality requirements for project deliverables.
Plan quality processes and tools.
Help ensure regulatory compliance.

topics.title: Plan and Optimize Quality: Execution
topics.description: Execute quality plans, conduct reviews, manage the cost of quality, and drive continuous improvement.
learning_objectives: Execute a quality management plan.
Manage cost of quality (CoQ) and sustainability.
Conduct ongoing quality reviews.
Implement continuous improvement.

topics.title: Plan and Manage Schedule: Creation
topics.description: Estimate tasks, utilize historical data, and create a baseline schedule based on the development approach.
learning_objectives: Prepare a schedule based on the selected development approach.
Coordinate with other projects and operations.
Estimate project tasks (milestones, dependencies, story points).
Utilize benchmarks and historical data.
Create a project schedule.
Baseline a project schedule.

topics.title: Plan and Manage Schedule: Execution
topics.description: Execute the approved schedule and accurately analyze variations or deviations.
learning_objectives: Execute a schedule management plan.
Analyze schedule variation.

topics.title: Evaluate Project Status: Artifacts
topics.description: Identify, tailor, and ensure proper accessibility and management of project artifacts.
learning_objectives: Identify and tailor needed artifacts.
Help ensure artifacts are created, reviewed, updated, and documented.
Help ensure accessibility of artifacts.
Continually assess the effectiveness of artifact management.

topics.title: Evaluate Project Status: Metrics
topics.description: Assess project progress, measure core metrics, and communicate project status efficiently.
learning_objectives: Develop project metrics, analysis, and reconciliation.
Assess current progress.
Measure, analyze, and update project metrics.
Communicate project status.

topics.title: Manage Project Closure
topics.description: Successfully conclude project activities, capture lessons learned, and transition deliverables to operations.
learning_objectives: Obtain project stakeholder approval of project completion.
Determine criteria to successfully close the project or phase.
Validate readiness for transition (e.g., to operations team or next phase).
Conclude activities to close the project or phase (e.g., final lessons learned, retrospectives, procurement, financials, resources).

sections.title: Domain III: Business Environment
sections.description: Highlights the connection between projects and organizational strategy, emphasizing governance, compliance, and adapting to changes.

topics.title: Define and Establish Project Governance
topics.description: Establish proper structures, rules, and escalation thresholds utilizing organizational process assets.
learning_objectives: Describe and establish the structure, rules, procedures, reporting, ethics, and policies through the use of organizational process assets (OPAs).
Define success metrics.
Outline governance escalation paths and thresholds.

topics.title: Plan and Manage Project Compliance: Assessment
topics.description: Confirm project requirements related to security, health, safety, sustainability, and assess noncompliance consequences.
learning_objectives: Confirm project compliance requirements (e.g., security, health and safety, sustainability, regulatory compliance).
Classify compliance categories.
Determine potential threats to compliance.
Analyze the consequences of noncompliance.

topics.title: Plan and Manage Project Compliance: Execution
topics.description: Execute methods supporting compliance and continually measure the extent to which the project complies.
learning_objectives: Use methods to support compliance.
Determine the necessary approach and action(s) to address compliance needs.
Measure the extent to which the project is in compliance.

topics.title: Manage and Control Changes
topics.description: Communicate status, execute change control processes, and update associated documents to reflect approved changes.
learning_objectives: Execute the change control process.
Communicate the status of proposed changes.
Implement approved changes to the project.
Update project documentation to reflect changes.

topics.title: Remove Impediments and Manage Issues
topics.description: Evaluate, prioritize, and clear impediments or blockers while collaborating effectively with stakeholders.
learning_objectives: Evaluate the impact of impediments.
Prioritize and highlight impediments.
Determine and apply an intervention strategy to remove/minimize impediments.
Reassess continually to help ensure impediments, obstacles, and blockers for the team are being addressed.
Recognize when a risk becomes an issue.
Collaborate with relevant stakeholders on an approach to resolve the issues.

topics.title: Plan and Manage Risk: Planning
topics.description: Systematically identify, analyze, and develop comprehensive risk management plans.
learning_objectives: Identify risks.
Analyze risks.
Develop a risk management plan.

topics.title: Plan and Manage Risk: Execution
topics.description: Monitor current risks, maintain a comprehensive register, and execute specialized responses for issues such as security.
learning_objectives: Monitor and control risks.
Maintain a risk register (e.g., poor IT security).
Execute a risk management plan (e.g., risk response for security and managing sustainability risks).
Communicate the status of a risk impact on the project.

topics.title: Continuous Improvement
topics.description: Incorporate lessons learned to foster ongoing improvement and update organizational process assets.
learning_objectives: Utilize lessons learned.
Help ensure continuous improvement processes are updated.
Update organizational process assets (OPAs).

topics.title: Support Organizational Change
topics.description: Evaluate shifts in organizational culture and define necessary project actions to support organizational transformation.
learning_objectives: Assess organizational culture.
Evaluate the impact of organizational change on the project and determine required actions.

topics.title: Evaluate External Business Environment Changes
topics.description: Assess regulations, geopolitical events, and technology changes to understand and prioritize their impact on the project.
learning_objectives: Survey changes to the external business environment (e.g., regulations, technology, geopolitical, market).
Assess and prioritize the impact on project scope/backlog based on changes in the external business environment.
Continually review the external business environment for impacts on project scope/backlog.
